name: CHSP - 3
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

I recently refined your custom home search portal…it updates in real time with the latest listings that match what you’re looking for. %custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

If any of those are standing out, I’d be happy to send over a quick breakdown: like price trends, neighborhood insights, or how it compares to others nearby.

Sometimes a little extra info makes the decision a whole lot easier. Let me know if that would help!

Best,
subject: Fine-tuned home search

automations.name: New Lead - Custom Home Search Portal
